title: hibbertia oblongata subsp. brevifolia
intro: Hibbertia oblongata subsp. brevifolia, also known as Guinea flower, is a plant species native to Western Australia that belongs to the Dilleniaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Guinea flower include its potential to alleviate skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin. Herbal preparations of Hibbertia oblongata subsp. brevifolia may be used in topical creams or ointments to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
